full_name: High carbon chromium bearing steel grade SUJ2 (per JIS G4805)
scope: High-carbon (~1% C) chromium bearing steel for through-hardened rolling bearing rings, balls and rollers. Excellent wear resistance, fatigue strength and hardenability. Equivalent to AISI 52100 / DIN 100Cr6 / EN31.
license_note: composition/property data widely republished by independent free manufacturer datasheets, not the copyrighted JIS document text
